prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211、双一流；软科主榜排名 持续上升，2026年约第61名，近年排名稳步提升；2026年声誉评价偏负面，但以中性管理事件为主（外卖配送管理争议），未见重大负面舆情；抖音热度排名第 38（较热），有一定关注度；心理学A、教育学A、马克思主义理论A-，师范类学科实力突出，对相关专业报考有吸引力。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机、电子 信息、电气等工科专业持续高热推荐；本省2026年考生总数约53.5万，较2025年约46.3万增加约15.6%，竞争显著加剧；西南大 学位于重庆，与四川相邻，地域偏好明显，本省招生占比较高，2025年物理类704人、历史类74人，为西南大学重要生源省份。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年计划 扩招约9.1%及本省考生增加约15.6%，在2025年基准38241名基础上预计竞争加剧；预测最低位次约40427名，区间39927–40927名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: 2022–2025 Physics Category (including Science) minimum rankings approximately 42489→35075→39504→38241, fluctuating within the 35000–42500 range in recent three years, with a 2025 baseline of about 38241; provincial Physics Category enrollment plans: 717 in 2022, 713 in 2023, 722 in 2024, 704 in 2025; 2026 plan 768, an increase of about 9.1% compared to 2025, slightly intensifying competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 211, Double First-Class; Soft Science main ranking continuously rising, approximately 61st in 2026, steadily improving in recent years; 2026 reputation evaluation slightly negative, but mainly neutral management incidents (food delivery management controversy), no major negative public opinion; Douyin popularity ranking 38th (relatively hot), with some attention; Psychology A, Education A, Marxist Theory A-, strong teacher-training disciplines, attractive for related major applications.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer, Electronic Information, Electrical Engineering and other engineering majors remain highly recommended; provincial 2026 total examinees about 535,000, an increase of about 15.6% compared to 2025's approximately 463,000, significantly intensifying competition; Southwest University located in Chongqing, adjacent to Sichuan, with clear regional preference, high proportion of provincial enrollment, 704 Physics Category and 74 History Category in 2025, making it an important source province for Southwest University.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering historical ranking fluctuations, 2026 enrollment plan expansion of about 9.1%, and provincial examinee increase of about 15.6%, competition is expected to intensify based on the 2025 baseline of 38241; predicted minimum ranking approximately 40427, range 39927–40927.
